name: Tofu Potpie
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup flour, whole-grain wheat, or ww pastry flour
1 cup green peas, frozen, or other frozen vegetables
recipeInstructions:
FILLING
In a large saucepan, bring vegetable broth to a boil over medium-high heat. Add potatoes and cook 5 minutes. Add carrots, onion (if using), and celery (if using) and cook another 3 minutes. Add peas (and/or other vegetables) and mushrooms (if using). Cook until vegetables are tender.
In a small bowl, combine flour, pepper, and poultry seasoning. Mix with skim milk (or soy milk or water) until smooth. Gradually stir into the vegetable mixture, stirring constantly over medium-high heat for about 3 minutes, or until thickened and bubbly. Remove from heat and stir in tofu cubes. Add salt to taste.
To assemble:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Spoon tofu-vegetable mixture into a 2-quart square casserole dish. Make dumplings with the crust mixture. Bake for 40 minutes, or until crust is done. Let stand 10 minutes before serving.
